parameters.content:
## 📥 Inbox Reply Triage

**What it does:** watches your inbox and, for every new email, classifies it — Hot lead / Needs reply / FYI / Ignore — with a one-line reason and a suggested reply. It logs each to a `Triage` sheet so you open your day to a ranked list instead of an undifferentiated pile. Nothing is auto-sent.

### Setup (≈6 minutes)
1. **New email** node → connect your Gmail account. (It triggers on incoming mail.)
2. **Classify (AI)** → add your OpenAI API key.
3. Make a Google Sheet with a tab `Triage` (headers: From, Subject, Priority, Why, Suggested Reply, At). Open **Log to Triage** → connect Google → pick it.
4. Activate the workflow (toggle top-right) so it runs on new mail.

💡 Sort the `Triage` sheet by Priority to work top-down. Edit the categories in the prompt to fit your world.
💡 Not on Gmail? Swap the trigger + log for Outlook/IMAP — the AI step stays the same.

— Free template from workflowstacks.com
